title: PCGMon
description:
A modpack created for PCGMon public cobblemon server.
Download and enjoy the community!
body:
![PCGMon Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40dc124e2bcda5957de8387189f5dbb0f9aef7f9.png)

Welcome To PCGMon!

Embark on an epic journey in the world of Cobblemon with the PCGMon! This mod pack is crafted to enhance your gameplay with a variety of quality of life improvements and exciting new features.

Features:

Mini Map: Navigate the expansive Cobblemon world with ease using our intuitive mini map.
Storage Mods: Keep your items organized and easily accessible with advanced storage solutions.
Adventure Mods: Dive into thrilling quests and uncover new adventures at every turn.
Claiming Mod: Protect your base and valuable items from griefers with our robust claiming system.
We are constantly seeking ways to improve our server, brainstorming events, and finding new ways to keep players active and incentivized. Join the adventure today and experience Cobblemon like never before!

 

Join our discord to be notified quicker of server updates and events!

[PCGMon DIscord Link](https://discord.gg/pcgmon)
